parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Prepare Email Data').first().json.user_id }}",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Prepare Email Data').first().json.client_id }}",
  "channel": "email",
  "type": "appointment_reminder",
  "subject": "Confirmation de rendez-vous",
  "content": "{{ $('Prepare Email Data').first().json.rdv_title }} - {{ $('Prepare Email Data').first().json.rdv_date }}",
  "sent_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "status": "sent"
}
